stemHtml: Apart from the aircraft experiencing the emergency, who else is authorised to transmit on the emergency frequency?

options.a: The controller in charge, and the officer in charge of the fire rescue team.
options.b: All official personnel present to assist the aircraft.
options.c: The controller in charge, the officer in charge of the fire team, and the dispatcher.
options.d: The controller in charge, plus every member of the fire rescue team.
